note: The scenario CATALOG index (build-time authoring input). The generator rotates the daily bank over status=='live' scenarios only (a stable hash of the date over the sorted live ids), so a 'build' scenario can be authored + tested via `generate.py --scenario <id>` WITHOUT entering the live daily rotation - stage new templates here as 'build', promote to 'live' when ready. tone/kind are free-form editorial tags. id == template filename stem; file == '<id>.json'. Every listed file must exist and every datasets/templates/*.json (except this manifest) must be listed - the loader fails fast otherwise. See docs/architecture/generator/pipeline.md.
